author: malxire
name: Short Cut with Antenna
description: A simple short hairstyle with an antenna that sticks up like a Heracross's, like Aaron of the Sinnoh Elite Four's.

author: gummy.frog
name: Balanced Bun
description: A practical bun worn by ace trainers. It kind of looks like a Medicham's helmet.

author: gummy.frog
name: Slick Spikes
description: Short spikes slick with gel, so your hair doesn't fall down in your face while you train.

author: blackbosom
name: Afro
description: A full, fluffy afro that's big, bold, and impossible to ignore, perfect for making a statement!

author: gummy.frog
name: Baby Hair
description: A single curled strand of hair that makes you look like you were just born.

author: kiwikelly
name: Bald
description: A completely bald look - no hair, no fuss, just pure, unadulterated scalp!

author: gummy.frog
name: Messy High Ponytail
description: A tight, but messy ponytail that's been through a lot of training exercises. It's cute and edgy.

author: ororus
name: Messy Afro
description: A flattened afro with an unkempt, rounded shape, offering a low-maintenance yet distinctive look.

author: blackbosom
name: Bob Cut
description: A sleek bob cut with chin-length hair that frames the face with a sharp, modern edge.

author: blackbosom
name: Bowl Cut
description: A classic bowl cut with evenly trimmed hair all around, offering a neat and straightforward look.

author: gummy.frog
name: Box Braided Buns
description: A half-up, half-down hairstyle featuring cute, poofy buns and elegant box braids.

author: gummy.frog
name: Box Braids
description: A cascade of long, elegant, intricate box braids.

author: gummy.frog
name: Braided Buns
description: This space-inspired hairstyle combines braids and poofy hair into one adorable updo.

author: malxire
name: Braided Mohawk
description: A mohawk comprised of one giant braid. It's very edgy and stylish!

author: .payapon
name: Crashing Wave Mane
description: A medium-length haircut often sported by surfers.

author: .payapon
name: Ruby Spikes
description: Short hair with sharp, upward spikes at the front and crown. This style is popular with fledgling trainers in Hoenn.

author: .payapon
name: Short, Neat Spikes
description: Neatly arranged spikes that look intimidating and disciplined. The style was popularized by Gym Leader Brock.
notes: pewter city's salon after beating gym?

author: .payapon
name: Square-Cut Bangs
description: Medium-length hair with messy square-cut bangs. This cut is usually seen on young Bug Catchers.

author: gummy.frog
name: Artistic Waves
description: Waves cascading from your head that look almost too precise to be messy. Now that's art!

author: blackbosom
name: Buzz Cut
description: A clean, close-cropped buzz cut for a sharp and low-maintenance appearance.

author: gummy.frog
name: Windswept Locks
description: Straightened hair with a middle part. It catches the wind as you chase down legendary Pokemon.

author: .payapon
name: Over-Shoulder Braid
description: A long braid that goes over the shoulder.

author: gummy.frog
name: Wildfire Updo
description: A wild, unkempt hairstyle that resembles the flaming heat of the kitchen.

author: .payapon
name: Ponytail Spiky Bangs
description: Long, beautiful bushy hair tied in a thick ponytail. The style was popularized by Gym Leader Clair.
notes: blackthorn city's salon after beating gym?

author: malxire
name: Pointy Pompadour
description: A pointy geled pompadour, to make you look like a totally normal academy student

author: malxire
name: Side Slick Fade
description: A short hairstyle popular in Kalos, inspired by Poison-type Pokemon.
notes: Default hairstyle OR part of a regional set

author: blackbosom
name: Cornrows
description: Neatly braided cornrows that run close to the scalp that create a sleek and intricate pattern.

author: malxire
name: Dancer
description: Braids put up in a ponytail. They flow with the rhythm of the music as you dance.

author: .payapon
name: Twinleaf Tresses
description: A long, half-updo style with blunt bangs. Popular among fledgling trainers in the Sinnoh region.

author: nymphiaribbon._.
name: Eevee Tail
description: A puffy ponytail that looks just like the tail of an Eevee.

author: .payapon
name: Neat Backwave
description: Short, combed back to hair that give a tidy and professional appearance. This style was popularized by Professor Elm.

author: blackbosom
name: Emo Bangs
description: A styled haircut with long, angled layers and sweeping bangs for a dramatic and edgy look.

author: .payapon
name: Bandana Straight Hair
description: Medium-length hair that falls straight down around a gray bandana. The style was popularized by Gym Leader Erika.
notes: celadon city's salon after beating gym?

author: blackbosom
name: Fade Haircut
description: A fade haircut with gradually shortened sides and back, blending seamlessly into longer hair on top.

author: .payapon
name: Droopy Bangs
description: Medium-length bangs that flow beautifully in the wind. This style was popularized by Gym Leader Falkner.
notes: violet city's salon after beating gym?

author: gummy.frog
name: Lava Plume Ponytail
description: A topknot ponytail that flares out into a brilliant plume of hair.

author: gaogao028
name: Medium Flareout
description: Medium, smooth hair which curls at its endsides, giving a winged silhouette to your hair..

author: ohok3441
name: Side-Swept Fringe
description: A bold, asymmetrical hairstyle where strands fuse into a stylish wave.

author: .payapon
name: Guardian Fringe
description: A neat fringe that covers one eye that is styled to look like a Gardevoir.

author: .payapon
name: Front Spikes
description: Spikes that give an air of smugness and youthful rebellion. The style is popular with fledgling trainers in Kanto.

author: ohok3441
name: Pomeg Cut
description: A cute cut that is styled like a Pomeg berry!

author: .payapon
name: Glorious Bob-cut
description: A short, chin-length haircut with a longer strand on the left side. Popular among fledgling trainers in the Galar region.

author: .payapon
name: Short Unkempt Tuft
description: A short unkempt hairstyle with a long bang. Popular with young trainers in the Johto Region.

author: rosemagwin
name: Playhouse Ponytail
description: A cute curly ponytail styled just like a Happiny. A wonderfully charming style for any fans of Baby Pokémon.

author: xenophacilus
name: Wild Locks
description: This wild mane of flowing locks is untamable, as if it was haunted. This style is popular with Hex Maniacs.

author: blackbosom
name: High-bun
description: A high bun, ideal for keeping your hair out of your face.

author: blackbosom
name: High-bun Bangs
description: A high bun with bangs, ideal for keeping the rest of your hair out of your face.

author: blackbosom
name: Ponytail
description: A high ponytail reminiscent of Lopunny's fur.

name: Puffy High Bun
description: A textured bun tied up high on your head.

author: .payapon
name: High-pony
description: A voluminous high ponytail that shows you're ready for adventure. It's popular with new trainers in Unova!

author: blackbosom
name: Hime
description: Straight, shoulder-length hair with blunt bangs and long side strands.

author: apixelperfectionist
name: Phoenix Crest
description: A bold, fiery style featuring a high, curved ponytail resembling the sweeping feathers of Ho-Oh.

author: gummy.frog
name: Demi Bob
description: A soft, short bob with a glamorous edge.

author: .payapon
name: Short Idol Hair
description: A short hairstyle with a flowly top.

author: .payapon
name: Spiky Ponytail
description: Slicked back hair tied in a tight spiky ponytail. The style was popularized by Gym Leader Koga's daughter, Janine.

author: gummy.frog
name: Steel Twintails
description: A half-up, half-down hairstyle that invokes the security of the steel type.

author: xenophacilud
name: Rocket Wave
description: A dramatic, sleek style with ultra-long hair swept back into a high, gravity-defying wave.

author: gummy.frog
name: Quirky Odango Bob
description: This quirky, cutesy hairstyle is popular with young girls.

author: gummy.frog
name: Nuvema Updo
description: A stylish and practical updo that keeps the hair out of your face while you research Pokemon.

author: .payapon
name: Springy Pigtails
description: Springy pigtails that somehow defy gravity.

author: .payapon
name: Slicked-Back Straight
description: Slicked-back medium-length straight hair, in a very traditional cut. The style was popularized by Gym Leader Kurt.

author: blackbosom
name: Waist-Length Hair
description: Long, flowing waist-length hair with short, chunky bangs.

author: Game Freak
name: Wild Upwards Spikes
description: Upwards-facing wild spikes. Very bold! The style was popularized by Elite Four Lance.

author: malxire
name: Two-Toned Slick Back
description: A practical, elegant style perfect for conducting business. Or battling with various Pokemon types. This style is modeled after Larry's, who's in the Paldean Elite Four.

author: blackbosom
name: Puffy Pigtails
description: Medium-length hair styled into two puffy pigtails, giving a cheerful and youthful look.

author: .payapon
name: Poofy Hair
description: Long, poofy hair popular with young women.

author: kiwikelly
name: Shaggy Hair Bangs
description: Shoulder length shaggy hair that's been kept in check by constantly wearing a hat.

author: ohok3441
name: Verdant Bob
description: A peculiar hairstyle that's meant to resembles the leaves of a Leafeon.

author: .payapon & kiwikelly
name: Tied-back Afro
description: An afro tied back with a headband to keep flyaway hairs taime. The style was popularized by the Unovan Gym Leader Lenora.
notes: protag special - unlocked after quest, show a Pokemon from unova

author: gummy.frog
name: Low Braids w/ Bangs
description: Long flowing hair tied in low braids, laid over the shoulders. It's a cute, easy style for traveling trainers.

author: blackbosom
name: Low-pony
description: A low ponytail reminiscent of Lopunny's fur

author: malxire
name: Voluminous Curls
description: Long, wavy hair with a distinctive side part, featuring large curls that frame the face and flow down the shoulders.
notes: protag special - unlocked after quest, show a Pokemon from hoenn

author: chromaerym
name: Lunar Cut
description: A bob cut shaped like a crescent moon, with a sleek, curved silhouette.

author: cristata
name: Lupine Cut
description: A sleek cut that is reminiscent of a Lycanroc's mane

author: .payapon
name: Peppy Pigtails
description: Bouncy pigtails with a playful charm that gives off a carefree vibes.

name: Marshtomp Mohawk
description: An edgy mohawk inspired by Marshtomp's upper fin.

author: mykoloth94
name: Long Teethed Ponytail
description: A unique style of ponytail adorned with acessories that look just like the teethed antenna of a Mawile.

author: kiwikelly & .payapon
name: Sapphire Side Tails
description: Medium-length brown hair with a fringe and side-swept bangs. This style is popular with fledgling trainers in Hoenn.
notes: protag special - unlocked after quest, show a Pokemon from hoenn

author: blackbosom
name: Flowing Twin Tails
description: Long hair styled into voluminous twin tails with delicate, flowing strands that give off a magical and ethereal appearance.

author: blackbosom
name: High Twin Tails
description: Long hair styled into high, puffy twin tails with straight, side-swept bangs that give off a vibrant and playful look.

author: malxire
name: Bow and Stripes
description: A cute hairstyle featuring long twintails with stripey highlights and a bow.
notes: Possibly obtainable in the Pokemon Trainer School.

author: .payapon
name: Two-Toned Afro
description: An large two-toned afro with a zigzag pattern. A very bold choice, only for the most disco of trainers.

author: .payapon
name: Spiky Medium Hair
description: Medium-length hair that looks beautiful and youthful. The style was popularized by Gym Leader Misty.
notes: cerulean city's salon after beating gym?

author: .payapon
name: Spiky Side Pigtail
description: Short, spiky hair with a spiky side ponytail. The style was popularized by Gym Leader Misty.
notes: cerulean city's salon after beating gym?

author: gummy.frog
name: Mod Bob
description: Chin-length hairstyle with sharp and geometric lines that was popular a long time ago.

author: malxire
name: Short Mohawk
description: A short mohawk with the rest of the head shaved to a buzz cut. It's a style popular with punks and bikers.

author: .payapon
name: Elegant Mom Pony
description: An elegant hairstyle popular with moms. It's practical and fashionable!

author: .payapon
name: Messy Mom Bun
description: A messy hairstyle typically seen on moms who really deserve a break...

author: gummy.frog
name: Mudkip Flip
description: A spiky, flipped hairstyle inspired by the gills on Mudkip.
notes: PIF Hoenn: Start with Mudkip or show the equivalent of the Saffron Boutique a Mudkip fusion; PIF1: Show the Saffron Boutique woman a Mudkip fusion

author: .payapon
name: Mullet
description: Business in the front, party in the back!

author: malxire
name: Fork and Knife Cut
description: A hairstyle worn by those who love to cook.

author: .payapon
name: Short, Shaggy spikes
description: Short, shaggy spikes that go well with visor-type hats. The style is popular with fledgling trainers in Unova.
notes: protag special - unlocked after quest, show a Pokemon from unova

author: malxire
name: Accessorized Corn Rows
description: Long corn rows with accesories, the last in kalosian fashion

author: capwolfbane
name: Shaggy Ponytail
description: A long, low ponytail that gives off a mysterious air. The style is popular with trainers in Unova.
notes: protag special - unlocked after quest, show a Pokemon from unova

author: gummy.frog
name: Joyful Puffs
description: Neatly coiled twin buns perched high on each side, radiating care and warmth.

author: gummy.frog
name: Side Joyful Puff
description: A single coiled bun perched high on one side, radiating care and warmth.

author: gummy.frog
name: Elegant Waves
description: A sophisticated hairstyle that's popular with a lot of trainers with corporate jobs.

author: gummy.frog
name: Pom-Pom Puffs
description: Big, bubbly twin puffs bursting with cheer!

author: kiwikelly
name: Soft Side Bangs
description: Short hair with soft, fluffy bangs parted to the sides, often worn by sensitive souls such as artists.

author: blackbosom
name: Pigtails
description: High, bouncy pigtails tied with ribbons, adding a fun and youthful touch to your look.

author: blackbosom
name: Pixie Cut
description: A short, playful pixie cut with closely cropped sides and a bit of length on top for a modern, airy look.

author: .realthree
name: Polished Scalp
description: A completely bald head with some polish to make it shiny!

author: dabouiw
name: Pompadour
description: A dramatic, swept-back hairstyle with towering volume at the front.

author: gummy.frog
name: Punk Tails
description: High, wild twin ponytails bursting with volume and rebellion.

author: malxire
name: Rising Star Dreads
description: Stylish dreadlocks tied up in a bun. Some hang down loosely in the front.

author: kiwikelly
name: Short Hat Hair
description: Short spiky hair that's been flattened by constantly wearing a hat.

author: gummy.frog
name: Edgy Asymmetrical Cut
description: An edgy, asymmetrical hairstyle with a highlight in the center.
notes: Possibly tied to a ranger-themed quest?

author: blackbosom
name: Combover
description: A sleek, neatly styled combover with a side part that creates a polished and refined appearance.

author: malxire
name: Paldean Ponytail
description: A long ponytail with spiky bangs, just like the Paldean Elite Four member Rika's.

author: .payapon & gummy.frog
name: Long Pigtails Buns
description: An eye-catching hairdo with two large side buns that continue into long pigtails. It's popular with fledgling trainers in Unova
notes: protag special - unlocked after quest, show a Pokemon from unova

author: xenophaclius
name: Roserade (Medium)
description: Medium-length spiky hair that's styled to resemble a Roserade's head flower.

author: xenophaclius
name: Roserade (Short)
description: Short, spiky hair that's styled to resemble a Roserade's head flower.

author: .payapon
name: Studious Pigtails
description: Two long, straight pigtails that are secured by a large, fan like ribbon.

author: gummy.frog
name: Poison Barb Ponytail
description: A spiky topknot that's sure to intoxicate all who look upon you onstage as you rock out.

author: malxire
name: Bone Braids
description: Wickedly cool braids styled to look like bones. It's modeled after Paldean rapper Ryme's signature look.

author: .payapon
name: Clairvoyant Cut
description: A medium-length cut with a fringe that frames the face.The style was popularized by the Gym Leader Sabrina.

author: .payapon
name: Telekinetic Tresses
description: A long hairstyle with blunt bangs. It seems to flow independently of the wind. Popularized by the Gym Leader Sabrina.

author: malxire
name: Paradox Cut
description: A hairstyle reminiscent of one that was known to be popular a long, long time ago...

author: malxire
name: Samurai
description: A hairstyle just like the one that a samurai would wear!

author: malxire
name: New Moon Points
description: A short hairstyle with two distinct points. It almost looks like Skitty ears.

author: rosemagwin
name: Straight Side Bangs
description: Short, smooth hair that frames the face nicely and gives a trainer a youthful appearance.

author: icytos
name: Short Beard
description: Either you miraculously got the ability to grow beard, or you got creative with glue and salon floor clippings.

name: Square-Cut Bangs
description: Very short hair with square-cut bangs framing the face, giving a trainer a youthful, charming appearance.

author: blackbosom
name: Short Spikes
description: A short, spiky hairstyle popular with the alternative crowd.

author: .payapon
name: Single Back Braid
description: A simplistic long braid along the back.

author: chromaerym
name: Slick Mullet
description: A slicked-back mullet. It was popular when your parents were young, but it has since started to come back into fashion.

author: .payapon
name: High Side Pony
description: An elegant ponytail worn to the side that was popularized by a Galarian research assistant.

author: xenophaclius
name: Eon Bob
description: A layered bob with long, outward curls, exuding a gentle and mysterious charm.

author: .payapon
name: Surge Spikes
description: A spiky haircut often worn by members of the Kantonian military.

author: .payapon
name: Tied-back Wicks
description: Four very thick, chunky, cylindrical locs tied back behind the head in a cool style.

author: malxire
name: Tied-back Dreads
description: Some dreads that are half-up, half-down. It keeps them out of your face while still looking stylish.

author: gummy.frog
name: Torchic Tuft
description: A topknot-style ponytail inspired by the little tufts on a torchic's head.
notes: PIF Hoenn: Start with Torchic or show the equivalent of the Saffron Boutique a Torchic fusion; PIF1: Show the Saffron Boutique woman a Torchic fusion

author: .payapon
name: Tyranaspikes
description: Sharp spikes that look like the hide of a Tyranitar.

author: gummy.frog
name: Flyaway Short Cut
description: A messy, wind-swept crop with long, asymmetrical bangs that's popular in the Kalos region.

author: blackbosom
name: Veteran Bob
description: Short, practical hair styled into a neat bob with subtle layers, giving a no-nonsense look.

author: malxire
name: Spiky Sideburns
description: A spiky hairstyle with long sideburns. This style was popularized by Volkner, a Gym Leader from Sinnoh.

author: .payapon
name: Electrified Elder Hair
description: Thick beard and hair combo that sticks up in a single, prominent tuft.

author: sakebishi
name: Wavy Hair
description: A cute, short, wavy bob. It flows beautifully in the wind.

author: .payapon & blackbosom
name: Wavy Ponytail
description: A simple and cute ponytail made up of wavy hair.

author: gummy.frog
name: Messy Spikes
description: A short, spiky hairdo. It's been messed up from riding around on a motorcycle all day.
notes: possibly obtained after completing an orre quest/postgame

author: .payapon
name: Spiky Low Pigtails
description: Low pigtails that give a youthful look to the wearer. The style was popularized by Gym Leader Whitney.
notes: goldenrod city's salon after beating gym?

author: malxire
name: Magician's Bob
description: A short hairstyle with mysterious, side-parted bangs like Will of the Elite Four's.
